analyst_note: Q2 2024: ALPHV/BlackCat conducted exit scam in March, stealing ~$22M in Change Healthcare ransom before going dark. RansomHub emerged as successor, rapidly absorbing BlackCat affiliates. LockBitSupp publicly identified (Dmitry Khoroshev) by NCA in May 2024. Dark Angels received record $75M payment (confirmed by Zscaler — timing spans Q2/Q3). H1 total $459.8M means Q2 was stronger than Q1.

a1._label: Russian Domestic Actions Against Ecosystem Actors
a1.notes: NCA publicly named LockBitSupp as Dmitry Khoroshev (Russian national) in May 2024. No Russian domestic action followed. No sanctions evasion enforcement observed. Khoroshev sanctioned by US/UK/Australia in May 2024 — no Russian domestic counterpart.

a2._label: Time Lag: Referral to Observable Russian Action

a3.notes: Khoroshev naming with no Russian response is a significant negative indicator — suggests either active protection holding or indifference. Populate from analyst model.

events.name: LockBitSupp Identity Disclosure — Dmitry Khoroshev
events.notes: NCA/DOJ/AUS publicly attributed LockBitSupp identity. Sanctions issued by US Treasury, UK, Australia. No arrest — Khoroshev remains in Russia. Score: 7 (significant public exposure, financial sanctions — deducted for no arrest/custody, fast adaptation by subject).

b1.notes: No arrests of physical persons in Q2. Identity attribution without custody is a partial action — high intelligence value, limited operational disruption.

b2.notes: ALPHV exit scam (March 2024) — stole ~$22M Change Healthcare ransom, abandoned affiliates. Significant forum disruption. RansomHub rapidly absorbed BlackCat affiliates. Forum dispute volume elevated. LockBit rebranding discussion ongoing. ANALYST INFERENCE — high confidence on exit scam, moderate on defection count.

c1._label: Ransom Payment Volume vs. Victim Count
c1.crypto_price_note: BTC price range ~$60K-$72K in Q2 2024; crypto price appreciation inflates nominal USD figures
c1.source: Chainalysis H1 2024 mid-year update ($459.8M total H1); ransomware.live Q2 victim count = 1,248
c1.notes: CREDIBILITY NOTE: Payment volume is ANALYST ESTIMATE (Q2 estimated at $245M of $459.8M H1 total). Dark Angels $75M payment likely spans Q2-Q3 boundary — may inflate Q2 figure. Victim count is confirmed. Change Healthcare ransom ($22M paid to ALPHV + potential second payment) included in this quarter.

nh_reports.notes: Confirmed IC-reported payments. Subset only — not representative of full ecosystem payment volume. Use for trend and family-level analysis.

c2.source: Coveware Q2 2024 quarterly report — sector breakdown requires direct access
c2.notes: Change Healthcare attack (Q1-Q2 2024) placed extreme pressure on healthcare sector to pay. Overall Coveware payment rate for this period estimated ~30-35%. Sector splits: populate from Coveware Q2 2024 report.

c3.notes: ALPHV leak site went dark in March (exit scam, not LE action). Post volume increased 16% QoQ driven by RansomHub emergence and LockBit continued activity despite Cronos. No major LE-initiated takedowns in Q2. LockBit operating at reduced capacity.
